text.title: Heuristic Eval Severity Rubric Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Heuristic Eval Severity Rubric end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: pick-heuristic-source
step.action: Document which heuristic source the rubric is paired with.

step.name: draft-anchors
step.action: Pick 1+ representative example per level; bake into the rubric.

step.name: run-pair-eval
step.action: Both raters score independently; record both ratings.

step.name: check-drift-and-recalibrate
step.action: Drift > threshold triggers calibration discussion; rubric updated if anchors no longer fit.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to the rubric store.
